reason_for_call: Triage my messages and draft one reply.

reply_points: say the compressor shipment is still pending from the supplier
confirm the shop is tracking the part closely
promise another update tomorrow even if the part has not arrived

attributes.subject: Checking on Civic compressor
attributes.body: Hi Charlie, just following up on the AC compressor for my 2011 Civic. I know you were waiting on the supplier, but I have not heard back yet. Can you let me know if the part is still delayed and when you expect it in?

attributes.subject: Brake caliper update?
attributes.body: Afternoon, I wanted to see whether the rear brake caliper came in yet for my Impala. If it is still backordered, just let me know what the timeline looks like.

attributes.subject: Transit van ignition coils
attributes.body: Hey Charlie, checking whether those ignition coils for our Transit are still delayed. We are trying to plan around the van being down, so any ETA helps.

attributes.subject: Tomorrow lift training
attributes.body: Can we push tomorrow's lift safety walkthrough back by thirty minutes? I need to finish the parts run first thing.
